title: Triggers
description: Membuat trigger yang otomatis dijalankan saat event INSERT, UPDATE, atau DELETE terjadi.

commands.name: CREATE TRIGGER
commands.title: Membuat Trigger
commands.description: Trigger menjalankan fungsi secara otomatis sebelum atau sesudah operasi DML.
commands.syntax:
CREATE TRIGGER nama_trigger
{BEFORE | AFTER | INSTEAD OF} {INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE} ON tabel
[FOR EACH ROW | FOR EACH STATEMENT]
EXECUTE FUNCTION nama_fungsi();
commands.notes: Trigger function HARUS return TRIGGER type dan return NEW (BEFORE) atau NULL (AFTER).

commands.name: DROP TRIGGER
commands.title: Menghapus Trigger
commands.syntax: DROP TRIGGER [IF EXISTS] nama_trigger ON tabel [CASCADE];
commands.examples:
DROP TRIGGER set_updated_at ON users;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS users_audit ON users CASCADE;
commands.notes: Trigger di PostgreSQL terikat pada tabel tertentu.

commands.name: Event Trigger
commands.title: Event Trigger (DDL)
commands.description: Trigger yang merespons event DDL (CREATE, ALTER, DROP) di level database.
commands.syntax: CREATE EVENT TRIGGER nama ON event EXECUTE FUNCTION fungsi();
commands.notes: Event trigger hanya bisa dibuat oleh superuser.
